_meta.purpose: Competitor forwarders / brokers + existing customers handled by other sales. Filter BEFORE every new data import (Panjiva/Bloomberg/scraped) + before /batch/enqueue send. Never prospect these — competitors forward rates to their sales team, existing customers cause internal sales conflict.
_meta.usage: On ANY new CNEE import, match: (1) whitelist_domains bypass, (2) email exact in 'emails', (3) email domain in 'domains', (4) company name contains any keyword in 'keywords_in_company' (case-insensitive substring). Drop matches before writing to cnee_master_v2.xlsx.
_meta.policy: When Nelson adds a new competitor/existing-customer name here, ALL future data imports auto-exclude them. See is_competitor() in web_server.py.
